User.title: User
User.description: Represents a user within the Risabu Connect ERP system, linked to an external authentication system and assigned a specific role and department.

id.description: Unique identifier for the User entity.

firebaseUid.description: Unique ID from the external Firebase Authentication system, linking this user profile to an authenticated account.

email.description: The primary email address of the user.

firstName.description: The first name of the user.

lastName.description: The last name of the user.

phone.description: The contact phone number of the employee.

role.description: The assigned role of the user within the ERP system (e.g., 'Admin', 'Staff').

department.description: The department the employee belongs to (e.g., 'ICT', 'Finance', 'Registrar').

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the user record was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the user record was last updated.

Program.title: Program
Program.description: Represents an academic program or course offered by Risabu Technical Training Institute.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Program entity.

name.description: The official name of the academic program or course.

description.description: A brief description of the program, including its objectives and content.

durationMonths.description: The typical duration of the program in months.

tuitionFee.description: The base tuition fee for the program.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the program record was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the program record was last updated.

Student.title: Student
Student.description: Represents a student enrolled or applying to Risabu Technical Training Institute.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Student entity.

firstName.description: The first name of the student.

lastName.description: The last name of the student.

contactEmail.description: The primary contact email address for the student.

contactPhone.description: The primary contact phone number for the student.

admissionDate.description: The date the student was admitted to the college.

admissionStatus.description: The current status of the student's admission (e.g., 'Applied', 'Accepted', 'Enrolled', 'Rejected', 'Deferred').

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the student record was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the student record was last updated.

Enrollment.title: Enrollment
Enrollment.description: Represents a student's enrollment in a specific academic program for a particular period.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Enrollment entity.

studentId.description: Reference to the Student. (Relationship: Student 1:N Enrollment)

programId.description: Reference to the Program. (Relationship: Program 1:N Enrollment)

enrollmentDate.description: The date the student officially enrolled in the program.

academicYear.description: The academic year for which the student is enrolled (e.g., '2023-2024').

status.description: The current status of the enrollment (e.g., 'Active', 'Completed', 'Withdrawn', 'Suspended').

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the enrollment record was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the enrollment record was last updated.

Invoice.title: Invoice
Invoice.description: Represents a financial invoice issued to a student for tuition, fees, or other charges.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Invoice entity.

studentId.description: Reference to the Student to whom the invoice is issued. (Relationship: Student 1:N Invoice)

enrollmentId.description: Reference to the Enrollment related to this invoice, if applicable. (Relationship: Enrollment 1:N Invoice)

issueDate.description: The date the invoice was issued.

dueDate.description: The date by which the invoice payment is due.

totalAmount.description: The total amount due on the invoice.

outstandingAmount.description: The remaining amount outstanding on the invoice.

status.description: The current payment status of the invoice (e.g., 'Issued', 'Partially Paid', 'Paid', 'Overdue', 'Cancelled').

description.description: A brief description of what the invoice is for (e.g., 'Tuition Fee - Fall 2024').

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the invoice record was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the invoice record was last updated.

Payment.title: Payment
Payment.description: Records a payment made by a student towards an invoice or general income.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Payment entity.

invoiceId.description: Reference to the Invoice (Optional for Misc income).

studentId.description: Reference to the Student (Optional for Misc income).

receivedFrom.description: Entity or person paying if not a student.

paymentDate.description: The date the payment was received.

amount.description: The amount of the payment made.

paymentMethod.description: The method used for the payment (e.g., 'Cash', 'Bank Transfer', 'M-Pesa').

transactionReference.description: A unique reference number for the payment transaction.

recordedByUserId.description: Reference to the User who recorded this payment.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the payment record was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the user record was last updated.

ExpenseCategory.title: ExpenseCategory
ExpenseCategory.description: Defines categories for college expenses to facilitate organization and reporting.

id.description: Unique identifier for the ExpenseCategory entity.

name.description: The name of the expense category (e.g., 'Salaries', 'Utilities', 'Office Supplies', 'Maintenance').

description.description: A detailed description of the expense category.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the expense category record was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the expense category record was last updated.

Expense.title: Expense
Expense.description: Records an individual institutional expense incurred by Risabu Technical Training Institute.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Expense entity.

categoryId.description: Reference to the ExpenseCategory this expense belongs to. (Relationship: ExpenseCategory 1:N Expense)

description.description: A detailed description of the expense.

amount.description: The monetary amount of the expense.

expenseDate.description: The date when the expense was incurred or paid.

receiptUrl.description: An optional URL or path to a scanned copy of the expense receipt.

recordedByUserId.description: Reference to the User who recorded this expense. (Relationship: User 1:N Expense)

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the expense record was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the expense record was last updated.

firestore.reasoning: The Firestore structure ensures atomic authorization checks and real-time operational persistence.
